note: Illustrative, curated evaluation sample for the live demo. NOT the authoritative test set - the numbers in the README/Phase 4 come from the held-out split of the Davidson dataset. This small set exists so a reviewer can watch the model be scored in the browser. No protected-attribute slurs; hate_speech items target protected attributes with dehumanization/exclusion (the class definition), and offensive items carry the everyday profanity that defines the Davidson 'offensive' class so they sit in-distribution.

examples.text: People of that religion are subhuman and should be banned from the country.
examples.label: hate_speech

examples.text: Women are inferior and shouldn't be allowed to vote or hold real jobs.
examples.label: hate_speech

examples.text: Immigrants from that region are a disease our towns need to get rid of.
examples.label: hate_speech

examples.text: Gay people are an abomination and don't deserve the same rights as everyone else.
examples.label: hate_speech

examples.text: Disabled people are a burden on society and should be shut away.
examples.label: hate_speech

examples.text: That ethnic group is nothing but criminals and parasites.
examples.label: hate_speech

examples.text: We should keep those foreigners out; they're animals, not real people.
examples.label: hate_speech

examples.text: Followers of that faith are all terrorists and should be deported on sight.
examples.label: hate_speech

examples.text: Trans people are defective and a threat to normal families.
examples.label: hate_speech

examples.text: People from that country are stupid by nature and can't be trusted.
examples.label: hate_speech

examples.text: This referee is a damn idiot and should never work a game again.
examples.label: offensive

examples.text: Shut the hell up, you absolute moron, nobody asked for your opinion.
examples.label: offensive

examples.text: This restaurant is complete crap and the staff are clueless jackasses.
examples.label: offensive

examples.text: You're such a pathetic little shit, I can't believe anyone puts up with you.
examples.label: offensive

examples.text: What a trash movie, whoever made this garbage is a talentless hack.
examples.label: offensive

examples.text: Get the hell out of here, you annoying little bastard.
examples.label: offensive

examples.text: My coworker is a lazy piece of crap who never does a damn thing right.
examples.label: offensive

examples.text: This app is absolute bullshit and the developers are brainless clowns.
examples.label: offensive

examples.text: You played like a damn clown out there, that was embarrassing as hell.
examples.label: offensive

examples.text: That political party is full of corrupt idiots and I'm sick of their crap.
examples.label: offensive

examples.text: I love this new song, it's been on repeat all week!
examples.label: neither

examples.text: The weather is lovely today, let's go for a walk in the park.
examples.label: neither

examples.text: Thanks so much for your help, I really appreciate it.
examples.label: neither

examples.text: Our team shipped the release on time and everyone did great work.
examples.label: neither

examples.text: Can you recommend a good book for the weekend?
examples.label: neither

examples.text: The train was a little late but I still made my meeting.
examples.label: neither

examples.text: Happy birthday! Hope you have a wonderful day.
examples.label: neither

examples.text: I'm making pasta for dinner, want to join?
examples.label: neither

examples.text: The museum exhibit on ancient history was fascinating.
examples.label: neither

examples.text: Great presentation today, the charts were really clear.
examples.label: neither
